name: job-search
description: A private, local-first job-search assistant: pulls postings, judges each one's relevance against your prose preferences (qualitative — no scores), and digests the matches on a schedule you control.

interface.shortDescription: Pulls postings, judges fit against your prose preferences, and digests matches on a cadence you control
interface.longDescription: Set up and run a private, local-first job search: build a prose preferences brief, save searches, pull live postings, judge each one's relevance qualitatively (no scores), and get a digest of matches — on a schedule you control.
defaultPrompt: Help me set up my job search.
